archiveBannerBody: The live view shows the month measured by the report. Pick a completed measurement month to open a past snapshot.
archiveEmpty: No completed months in the archive yet. Each month is listed here automatically once it closes.
archiveLoadFailed: Failed to load the archive list.
archiveMissingSide: There is no {{label}} archive record for this month.
archivedSnapshotNote: This month is closed; the data comes from the archive and no longer updates.
cpiAndPpiSnapshotsAre: CPI and PPI snapshots are tracked in one workspace with release dates, scenario matrices and cross-asset playbooks.
cpiOnTheLeftPpi: CPI on the left, PPI on the right. Two workspaces on one surface.
failedToLoadTheCpi: Failed to load the CPI/PPI forecast.
ifOneSideIsMissing: If one side is missing, the last valid snapshot stays visible.
itShouldExistInRepo: It should exist in repo root or in the mounted data path.
scenarioCardsHaveNotBeen: Scenario cards have not been populated yet.
theHalfOfThePage: The {{label}} half of the page is ready. As soon as the snapshot lands, this side fills automatically.
thePipelineMustNotLeave: The pipeline must not leave this file only in a private scratch folder. The final artifact has to land on a readable target.
thePlaybookHasNotBeen: The playbook has not been populated yet.
thereIsNoCpiOr: There is no CPI or PPI forecast snapshot yet. This page will populate automatically once the pipeline produces cpi_forecast.json or ppi_forecast.json.
theWatchlistHasNotBeen: The watchlist has not been populated yet.
thisSectionUpdatesAutomaticallyAs: This section updates automatically as soon as the {{name}} snapshot arrives.
tracksConsumerPricingDirectionRate: Tracks consumer pricing direction, rate pressure, and the first reaction in risk assets.
tracksUpstreamPricePressureMargin: Tracks upstream price pressure, margin narrative, and the pass-through risk into CPI.
